known_gaps.reason: No standalone create UI; only /sales?delivery_filter=open list filter.
No bulk create UI; MRP runs are API-driven.
Multi-tab inventory form does not submit reliably for non-TRADING types in headless Chrome; seeded via API in system seed.
Manufacturing item master has no create UI; parent SKUs use DB helper before Selenium BOM lines.
